properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10 v9 v11 v12 v13 v9 v14 v3 v15 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: To the One who wore A crown of thorns To the One who took The lash and scourge For the hands and feet That were pierced by nails For the sacrifice That has torn the veil

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We crown You We fall face down and we worship We all cry out, "You are worthy, God" "You are worthy, God, yes"

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We crown You We fall face down and we worship We all cry out, "You are worthy, God" "You are worthy, God"

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: To the One who gave His very life away Who took upon Himself All our guilt and shame Hanging on a cross For the world He loved With His precious blood Purchased men for God

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: And we crown You We fall face down and we worship We all cry out, "You are worthy, God" "You are worthy, God"

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Yes, and we crown You We fall face down and we worship We all cry out, "You are worthy, God" "You are worthy, God"

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: To the One who endured All the shame of the cross To the Lamb who was slain As atonement for us To the Son who overcame All the power of death We praise!

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: For the stripes, for the wounds For the beating You bore For the tears, for the blood That was willingly poured For the merciful, for wonderful, for majesty of Your love

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: For the stripes, for the wounds For the beating You bore For the tears and the blood That was willingly poured For the merciful, for wonderful, for majesty of Your love!

verse.name: v12
verse.lines: We crown You We fall face down and we worship We all cry out, "You are worthy, God", You are "You are worthy, God"

verse.name: v13
verse.lines: We crown You We fall face down and we worship We all cry out, "You are worthy, God" "You are worthy, Lord"

verse.name: v14
verse.lines: For the stripes, for the wounds For the beating You bore For the tears, for the blood That was willingly poured For the merciful, for wonderful, for majesty of Your love!

verse.name: v15
verse.lines: We crown You We fall face down and we worship We all cry out, "You are worthy, God" "You are worthy, God", yeah, we crown
